title: Syrian-Style Flaky Pastry Bowl
description: A delicious and flaky pastry bowl filled with a sweet and savory syrup, perfect for a Middle Eastern-inspired dessert.
instructions: Roll out the flaky pastry to a thickness of about 1/8 inch.
Place the pastry in the large ceramic bowl, pressing it into the corners.
Mix the golden syrup and glistening water in a small bowl.
Pour the syrup mixture into the pastry-lined bowl.
Bake for 25-30 minutes, or until the pastry is golden brown.
Let cool for 10 minutes before serving.
